CustomField.description: Apex class name for custom Flow Channel implementation. Must implement UoWInterfaces.IFlowChannel. Leave blank to use default Salesforce Flow Channel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified Apex class name (e.g., MyCustomFlowChannel) that implements UoWInterfaces.IFlowChannel. Leave blank to use default UoWDefaultFlowChannel.
CustomField.label: Flow Channel Class Name
